title: UK Eurovision act: The BBC gave me a stress test to check I could cope under pressure
snippet: "It could go well or completely wrong, I'm just here for the ride," says song contest hopeful Sam Battle.

title: Who is James Murray, the new health secretary replacing Wes Streeting?
snippet: What are the most pressing priorities for the new minister in charge of health?

title: Teenager's family 'heartbroken' by meningitis death
snippet: The family of sixth form pupil Lewis Waters post a tribute following his death.

title: Farke says Leeds must match his ambition
snippet: Leeds head coach Daniel Farke says he is "not the right choice" to remain in charge of the club if they fail to match his ambition in the summer.

title: What is hantavirus and how does it spread?
snippet: The Andes strain of the virus, which can rarely be passed from person to person,  has been found among passengers of a cruise ship.

title: Olly Murs in tears as he completes endurance feat
snippet: He crossed the finish line at the London Stadium in Stratford after covering about 250 miles.

title: Everybody wants Hearts to win - Celtic boss O'Neill
snippet: Celtic manager Martin O'Neill believes "everybody wants Hearts to win" as he prepares his side for Saturday's Scottish Premiership title decider.

title: Farage paid for £1.4m house with I'm a Celebrity cash, says Reform
snippet: The Reform UK leader is being investigated by Parliament's standards watchdog over a £5m gift from a billionaire.

title: Is it safe to swim at England's bathing sites?
snippet: Signs warning people not to swim are in place at almost all of England's official inland river bathing sites due to concerns the water could be unsafe

title: Massive Alaska megatsunami was second largest ever recorded
snippet: New research suggests glacier melt driven by climate change is increasing the risk of giant waves.

title: UK's biggest ever environmental pollution claim reaches High Court
snippet: One of the UK's largest chicken producers and a water company accused of polluting three rivers including the River Wye

title: Five Italians die during cave scuba dive in Maldives
snippet: Four of the Italians were part of a team from the University of Genoa.

title: Trump warns Taiwan against declaring independence, hours after summit with China's Xi
snippet: The US president says he wants Beijing and Taipei to "cool down" tensions over the self-governing island.

title: Heathrow rival could lead expansion, watchdog says
snippet: The aviation watchdog is considering new rules for Heathrow ahead of its possible expansion.

title: French national shows symptoms on return from hantavirus-hit ship
snippet: Five passengers of the MV Hondius will be quarantined in Paris "until further notice", France's prime minister says.
